design_name.description: Unique label used as the output subfolder name.

le_sweep.description: Leading-edge sweep angle of the delta wing.

root_chord_in.description: Root chord length. MAC and aerodynamic center are derived as 2/3 of this.

twist_root.description: Geometric twist at the wing root (positive = leading edge up).

twist_tip.description: Geometric twist at the wing tip (washout when negative).

naca.m.description: NACA 4-digit max camber as integer percent of chord (0 = symmetric).
naca.m.constraint: When m=0, p must also be 0.

naca.p.description: NACA 4-digit position of max camber in tenths of chord.

naca.t.description: NACA 4-digit max thickness as integer percent of chord.

naca.chord_length.description: Chord length scale for the airfoil coordinate file.
